questions.question: Given a dataset of customer purchases, perform unsupervised clustering using the SOM algorithm and describe the resulting clusters and their characteristics. (12 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the number of clusters, their shapes, and any notable patterns or similarities within the clusters

questions.question: A dataset of images of different objects (e.g., animals, vehicles, buildings) needs to be clustered using SOM. Describe how you would prepare the dataset, normalize the pixel values, and choose the number of neurons for the SOM. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the implications of the choice of number of neurons on the clustering results

questions.question: Compare the performance of a SOM algorithm with k-means clustering on a given dataset. How do the SOM results compare in terms of cluster shapes, cluster assignments, and overall clustering quality? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider visualizing the clusters using different colors or markers to facilitate comparison
